items.title: Iran war tests role of Asian middle powers, says Thai ex-PM
Israel sent Iron Dome and troops to help defend UAE during Iran war – report
items.description: Move is first time the missile defense system has been deployed outside Israel and the US, according to Axios, which says UAE-Israel ties closer than ever The post Israel sent Iron Dome and troops to help defend UAE during Iran war – report appeared first on The Times of Israel.

items.title: Trump doubts shooter motivated by Iran war as peace talks on hold
items.description: A shooting incident at the White House Correspondent's Dinner took focus away from the war in Iran, as Iran's foreign minister planned to return to Islamabad, the site of previous peace talks.

items.title: Two Dead in Kramatorsk as Russian Shelling Hits Residential Area
items.description: A woman and a man were killed while standing on the street during a morning strike on the Donetsk region city, which also damaged eight homes and wounded a 50-year-old civilian.

items.title: Yemen’s landmine crisis endures despite truce and de-mining efforts
items.description: Landmines in Yemen continue to kill and maim, even amid ceasefire efforts and ongoing de-mining initiatives.

items.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Holds Talks In Oman, After US Envoys Abruptly Cancel Pakistan Trip
items.description: Iran’s foreign minister held talks with the leader of Oman, a day after the two lead US envoys abruptly pulled out of planned talks aimed at ending the nearly two-month old war in Iran. Abbas Araqchi’s meetings in Muscat on April 26 were part of the latest shuttle diplomacy and zig-zagging negotiations aimed at resolvi…

items.title: Mali’s Tuareg rebels announce deal for Russian Africa Corps withdrawal from Kidal
items.description: Tuareg rebels fighting Mali's army on Sunday announced an agreement allowing Russian Africa Corps forces to withdraw from Kidal, leaving the northern town "totally" under their control. Jihadist fighters coordinating with Tuareg rebels killed the junta's Defence Minister General Sadio Camara with a car bomb near the ca…

items.title: Ukrainian action thriller billed as Saving Private Ryan for the drone age
items.description: Killhouse is based on real-life story of civilian couple saved from battlefield by Ukrainian drone operatorsIt is being billed as Ukraine’s answer to Saving Private Ryan, updated for an age of drones.The war movie Killhouse is an action thriller which shows off the latest in battlefield technology. Released this week, …

items.title: Israeli strikes kill six in south Lebanon despite extended ceasefire, fresh raids reported
items.description: A new wave of bombardments has been reported overnight, even as a recently extended ceasefire with Hezbollah appeared to fray amid mutual accusations of violations.

items.title: Netanyahu, 'ho ordinato all'Idf di attaccare con vigore Hezbollah in Libano'
items.description: L''ufficio del premier israeliano: 'A seguito delle varie violazioni del cessate il fuoco'

items.title: Russian Strikes Kill 6 Across Ukraine
items.description: Four people were killed and 27 wounded in a single strike on an apartment block in Dnipro. Another strike nearly killed a local official.

items.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
items.description: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

items.title: Amid extended ceasefire, Lebanon assesses high cost of Israel-Hezbollah war
items.description: In this latest round of Israel-Hezbollah fighting, Lebanese civilians have once again paid a heavy price. Even as the ceasefire in Lebanon is extended, neither combatant is showing signs of backing down.

items.title: Ukraine: Zelenskyy visits Saudi Arabia, Putin weighs G20 attendance
items.description: Russian President Putin "may or not may not" attend the G20 in Miami in December, says the Kremlin. Meanwhile, after securing an EU loan, Ukrainian President Zelenskyy continued his diplomatic offensive in Saudi Arabia.

items.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 24 April: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended as humanitarian concerns persist
items.description: The United States has announced that the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire will be extended by three weeks following talks in Washington, offering a potential pause in hostilities. Meanwhile, humanitarian concerns are growing over shortages in Iran and Gaza, while another UN peacekeeper has died after coming under fire. Stay wi…
